Is this only a content player?
No. ON-DM LMS Platform covers catalog and checkout, bilingual delivery, cohort and live sessions, certificates, payments, and back-office operations — not just SCORM playback.
How does NELC readiness work in practice?
You get structured completion records, certificate controls, and data handoffs aligned to how regulated programs expect evidence — configured with your compliance stakeholders.
Which Saudi payment methods are supported?
The stack is built around common Saudi methods — including Mada and popular wallets — with SAR pricing and reconciliation paths suited to training businesses.
Can we run Arabic and English side by side?
Yes. RTL UI, bilingual catalogs, and learner journeys are first-class — not an afterthought translation layer.
How fast can we launch?

Most teams start with a focused catalog and branding, then expand modules. Timelines depend on content readiness — the goal is days-to-weeks for first production cohorts, not multi-quarter replatforming.
Who is the platform for?
Training providers and institutes that sell regulated or professional programs in Saudi Arabia and need one system for revenue, delivery, and operations.
Ready to run a Saudi-ready LMS — not another generic stack?
Start with NELC readiness, add Saudi payment flows, and give your learners a bilingual platform they'll actually complete. Launch in days, not months.
